positioning: structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating, low energy, or slow progress
relevant for PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS, menopause-related weight gain (not a cure claim)
protocol_morning: OK Liquid on empty stomach in the morning
warm pouch in hot water for 3-5 minutes
zero-calorie drinks (tea, coffee, lemon water) allowed
take first thing upon waking, even if wake-up time is unusual
protocol_night: OK Powder + OK Tablet ~15 minutes before bed
maintain 2-hour gap between dinner and bedtime
fasting_rules: no fixed meal timing - eat only when truly hungry
allowed_items: millets or oats (up to 30g if still hungry)
zero-calorie drinks - tea, coffee, lemon water, jeera water
restricted_items: simple carbohydrates - rice, wheat chapati, dal
mechanism_allowed_claims: can support more stable daily energy
can make a simpler routine easier to follow
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be adjustment phase
guarantee: if weight-loss start is not observed in first 7 days, refund applies
conditions: follow protocol + daily tracker sharing
refund not applicable without tracker information
continuation: continue until target weight or BMI 25 is reached
after each 30 days, keep 7 to 10 day break
break helps body accept reduced weight as new normal
maintenance: BMR-based intake (1200-1400 kcal for female, 1400-1600 kcal for male)
macro order: protein -> fiber -> fats -> carbs
replace simple carbs with complex carbs (millets)
heavy lunch, light dinner before 7 PM
limit outside food to once a week
proof_points: founder Dr. Arun Tyagi - 34 years experience, BAMS, M.D. Kaya Chikitsa

claim_a.text: 31 unique ingredients, 44 total entries (20 liquid, 12 powder, 12 tablet)

claim_b.text: 39 Ayurvedic herbs broken across three key components

chosen_claim.text: This is NOT a standalone fat-burner claim product - protocol-based appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction + digestion/gut-comfort support

claim_b.text: This is NOT a keto diet. However, the OK Liquid promotes natural ketosis
